test_cases.title: Boundary: Send empty or whitespace-only message
test_cases.description: Verify system behavior for boundary input while maintaining encryption requirements
preconditions: Sender is registered and logged in

steps.description: 1. Enter an empty or whitespace-only message
steps.expected_result: Input is recognized as empty/invalid

steps.description: 2. Tap Send
steps.expected_result: Message is not sent and user is prompted to enter valid content

test_cases.expected_result: No message is transmitted; encryption workflow is not triggered for invalid input

test_cases.title: Boundary: Maximum allowed message length encryption and delivery
test_cases.description: Verify encryption and delivery for maximum-sized message
preconditions: Sender and recipient are registered users

steps.description: 1. Compose a message exactly at maximum allowed length
steps.expected_result: Message is accepted in the input field

steps.description: 2. Send the message
steps.expected_result: Message is sent successfully and appears as sent

steps.description: 3. Recipient receives the message
steps.expected_result: Message is displayed correctly in plaintext

test_cases.expected_result: Maximum-length message is encrypted in transit and decrypted on recipient device without truncation

test_cases.title: Negative: Attempt to decrypt with wrong device keys
test_cases.description: Verify that using incorrect keys cannot decrypt message content
preconditions: Encrypted message exists in transport or storage
A device with non-matching keys is available

steps.description: 1. Attempt decryption of the encrypted payload using incorrect keys
steps.expected_result: Decryption fails

steps.description: 2. Observe any output or logs
steps.expected_result: No plaintext content is produced

test_cases.expected_result: Message remains unreadable without correct end-device keys

test_cases.title: Successful manual verification of matching security code
test_cases.description: Verify that matching codes can be confirmed and shown as verified
preconditions: An existing conversation with a displayed security code
Communication partner has the same security code

steps.description: 1. Open the conversation with the displayed security code
steps.expected_result: Security code is visible for the conversation

steps.description: 2. Initiate manual verification from the security code UI
steps.expected_result: System prompts user to confirm the code matches the partner's code

steps.description: 3. Confirm that the code matches and mark it as verified
steps.expected_result: Verification process completes without errors

test_cases.expected_result: System shows verification status as successful for the conversation

test_cases.title: Re-verification required after security code change
test_cases.description: Verify that a changed security code triggers a re-verification request
preconditions: Security code has changed for the conversation

steps.description: 1. Open the conversation where the security code has changed
steps.expected_result: System indicates the code has changed or verification is no longer valid

steps.description: 2. Start the verification flow again
steps.expected_result: System prompts for manual confirmation of the new security code

test_cases.expected_result: User is required to manually confirm the new security code before verification can be marked successful

test_cases.title: Failed verification for mismatched security code
test_cases.description: Verify warning and failure status when codes do not match
preconditions: An existing conversation with a displayed security code
Communication partner has a different security code

steps.description: 1. Open the conversation with the displayed security code
steps.expected_result: Security code is visible for the conversation

steps.description: 2. Initiate manual verification
steps.expected_result: System prompts user to confirm the code matches the partner's code

steps.description: 3. Indicate that the code does not match and complete verification
steps.expected_result: System processes the verification outcome

test_cases.expected_result: System shows a warning and marks verification as failed

test_cases.title: Boundary: Verification immediately after code change without user confirmation
test_cases.description: Ensure user cannot be marked verified without confirming the new code
preconditions: An existing conversation with a recently changed security code

steps.description: 1. Open the conversation with the changed security code
steps.expected_result: Verification status indicates re-verification required

steps.description: 2. Navigate away from the verification prompt without confirming
steps.expected_result: Verification remains pending or unverified

test_cases.expected_result: System does not show verification as successful until user confirms the new code

test_cases.title: Negative: Attempt to verify without partner comparison
test_cases.description: Ensure the system requires explicit user confirmation
preconditions: An existing conversation with a displayed security code

steps.description: 1. Open the conversation and open verification flow
steps.expected_result: Verification prompt appears

steps.description: 2. Attempt to finalize verification without confirming match (e.g., close prompt or submit without selection)
steps.expected_result: System prevents completion and keeps status unverified

test_cases.expected_result: Verification cannot be completed without explicit confirmation of code match

test_cases.title: Integration: Verification status persists after refresh
test_cases.description: Verify that successful verification status is stored and displayed after reload
preconditions: An existing conversation with a matching security code
User has successfully verified the security code

steps.description: 1. Refresh the conversation view or re-open the app
steps.expected_result: Conversation loads successfully

steps.description: 2. Open the same conversation
steps.expected_result: Security code and verification status are displayed

test_cases.expected_result: System still shows the verification status as successful

test_cases.title: Negative: Verification fails when code changes mid-verification
test_cases.description: Ensure the system handles a code change during verification and requires re-confirmation
preconditions: An existing conversation with a displayed security code
Security code can change due to key update or device change

steps.description: 1. Start verification and view the current security code
steps.expected_result: Verification prompt is active with current code

steps.description: 2. Trigger a code change (e.g., partner rekeys) before confirming
steps.expected_result: System detects the code change

steps.description: 3. Attempt to confirm the old code as matching
steps.expected_result: System blocks confirmation and prompts for new code verification

test_cases.expected_result: Verification is not marked successful; user must confirm the new code

test_cases.title: Enable app lock with authentication method
test_cases.description: Verify that enabling app lock and selecting an authentication method locks the app and requires authentication on every open

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Settings > Security
steps.expected_result: Security settings screen is displayed

steps.description: 2. Toggle 'App Lock' to ON
steps.expected_result: Prompt to select an authentication method appears

steps.description: 3. Select 'Device PIN' and complete setup
steps.expected_result: App lock is enabled and confirmation is shown

steps.description: 4. Close the app completely
steps.expected_result: App is closed

steps.description: 5. Reopen the app
steps.expected_result: Authentication prompt is shown before any messages are displayed

test_cases.expected_result: App remains locked on open and requires successful authentication to access messages

test_cases.title: Unlock app with correct authentication
test_cases.description: Verify successful authentication unlocks the app and grants access to messages

steps.description: 1. Open the app
steps.expected_result: Authentication prompt is displayed

steps.description: 2. Enter the correct authentication (PIN/biometric)
steps.expected_result: Authentication succeeds

steps.description: 3. Observe the app state after authentication
steps.expected_result: Messages screen is displayed and content is visible

test_cases.expected_result: App unlocks and user has access to messages

test_cases.title: Deny access on incorrect authentication
test_cases.description: Verify that incorrect authentication prevents access and keeps messages hidden

steps.description: 1. Open the app
steps.expected_result: Authentication prompt is displayed

steps.description: 2. Enter an incorrect PIN or fail biometric authentication
steps.expected_result: Authentication fails and an error message is shown

steps.description: 3. Attempt to view messages without authenticating
steps.expected_result: Messages remain hidden and access is denied

test_cases.expected_result: Access is denied after failed authentication and messages remain protected

test_cases.title: App remains locked after backgrounding and reopening
test_cases.description: Verify that the app requires authentication when reopened from background

steps.description: 1. Open the app and authenticate successfully
steps.expected_result: App is unlocked and messages are visible

steps.description: 2. Send the app to background for 30 seconds
steps.expected_result: App is running in background

steps.description: 3. Return to the app
steps.expected_result: Authentication prompt is displayed before messages

test_cases.expected_result: App requires authentication on reopen and does not expose messages

test_cases.title: Cancel authentication attempt
test_cases.description: Verify that canceling authentication keeps the app locked and messages hidden

steps.description: 1. Open the app
steps.expected_result: Authentication prompt is displayed

steps.description: 2. Tap 'Cancel' or dismiss the authentication prompt
steps.expected_result: Authentication is not completed and app remains locked

steps.description: 3. Attempt to navigate to messages
steps.expected_result: Access is blocked and messages are not visible

test_cases.expected_result: App stays locked when authentication is canceled

test_cases.title: Multiple failed authentication attempts
test_cases.description: Verify behavior after consecutive failed authentication attempts

steps.description: 1. Open the app
steps.expected_result: Authentication prompt is displayed

steps.description: 2. Enter an incorrect authentication three times consecutively
steps.expected_result: Each attempt fails with an error message

steps.description: 3. Observe any lockout or cooldown indication
steps.expected_result: If lockout is implemented, user is informed and access remains denied

test_cases.expected_result: App continues to deny access after multiple failed attempts and messages remain hidden

test_cases.title: Switch authentication method
test_cases.description: Verify that changing authentication method still enforces app lock on open

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Settings > Security
steps.expected_result: Security settings screen is displayed

steps.description: 2. Change authentication method from PIN to biometric
steps.expected_result: New method is saved and confirmed

steps.description: 3. Close and reopen the app
steps.expected_result: Authentication prompt uses the newly selected method

test_cases.expected_result: App lock remains enforced with the updated authentication method

test_cases.title: No message preview on lock screen
test_cases.description: Verify that messages are not visible before authentication at app launch

steps.description: 1. Open the app
steps.expected_result: Authentication prompt is displayed immediately

steps.description: 2. Observe the screen behind the authentication prompt
steps.expected_result: No message content is visible

test_cases.expected_result: Messages and sensitive data are not displayed before authentication

test_cases.title: App lock persists after device restart
test_cases.description: Verify that app lock remains enabled after device reboot

steps.description: 1. Restart the device
steps.expected_result: Device restarts successfully

steps.description: 2. Open the app
steps.expected_result: Authentication prompt is displayed

steps.description: 3. Authenticate successfully
steps.expected_result: Messages are accessible

test_cases.expected_result: App lock remains active across device restart

test_cases.title: Attempt access via app switcher preview
test_cases.description: Verify that messages are not exposed in app switcher preview when app is locked

steps.description: 1. Open the app and authenticate
steps.expected_result: Messages are visible

steps.description: 2. Send the app to background
steps.expected_result: App is in background

steps.description: 3. Open the app switcher
steps.expected_result: App preview does not show message content or is obfuscated

test_cases.expected_result: Messages are protected in app switcher when app lock is enabled

test_cases.title: Block existing contact successfully
test_cases.description: Verify a logged-in user can block an existing contact and the contact can no longer message
preconditions: User A has existing contact User B
User B is not currently blocked

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the contact details for User B
steps.expected_result: Contact details page for User B is displayed

steps.description: 2. Select the "Blockieren" option
steps.expected_result: "Blockieren" confirmation dialog is displayed

steps.description: 3. Confirm the block action
steps.expected_result: User B is marked as blocked and success message is shown

steps.description: 4. From User B account, attempt to send a message to User A
steps.expected_result: Message is not delivered to User A

test_cases.expected_result: User B is blocked and cannot send messages to User A

test_cases.title: Blocked contact receives feedback when sending message
test_cases.description: Verify blocked contact receives an appropriate feedback when message delivery is prevented
preconditions: User A has blocked User B

steps.description: 1. From User B account, compose a message to User A
steps.expected_result: Message composition screen is displayed

steps.description: 2. Send the message
steps.expected_result: System rejects the message

steps.description: 3. Observe sender feedback
steps.expected_result: User B receives a clear notification that the message was not delivered due to being blocked

test_cases.expected_result: Blocked sender is informed that the message was not delivered

test_cases.title: Block non-existent contact
test_cases.description: Verify blocking a non-existent contact results in an error and no changes

steps.description: 1. Attempt to block a contact with an invalid or non-existent contact ID
steps.expected_result: Block request is submitted

steps.description: 2. Observe system response
steps.expected_result: Error message is displayed indicating contact does not exist

steps.description: 3. Check blocked contacts list
steps.expected_result: No new blocked contact is added

test_cases.expected_result: Blocking fails with an error and no data changes occur

test_cases.title: Block action cancelled by user
test_cases.description: Verify cancellation of blocking does not block the contact
preconditions: User A has existing contact User B
User B is not currently blocked

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the contact details for User B
steps.expected_result: Contact details page for User B is displayed

steps.description: 2. Select the "Blockieren" option
steps.expected_result: "Blockieren" confirmation dialog is displayed

steps.description: 3. Cancel the block action
steps.expected_result: Dialog closes and no success message is shown

steps.description: 4. From User B account, send a message to User A
steps.expected_result: Message is delivered to User A

test_cases.expected_result: User B remains unblocked and can message User A

test_cases.title: Block contact already blocked
test_cases.description: Verify attempting to block an already blocked contact results in appropriate feedback without changes
preconditions: User A has blocked User B

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the contact details for User B
steps.expected_result: Contact details page for User B is displayed

steps.description: 2. Select the "Blockieren" option
steps.expected_result: System indicates User B is already blocked or block action is disabled

test_cases.expected_result: No duplicate block is created and user receives appropriate feedback

test_cases.title: Blocked contact cannot deliver message after block is applied
test_cases.description: Verify messages sent immediately after blocking are not delivered (boundary timing case)
preconditions: User A has existing contact User B
User B is not currently blocked

steps.description: 1. User A blocks User B and confirms
steps.expected_result: User B is marked as blocked

steps.description: 2. Immediately from User B, send a message to User A
steps.expected_result: Message is rejected and not delivered

test_cases.expected_result: Blocking takes effect immediately and messages are not delivered

test_cases.title: Report message successfully with valid reason
test_cases.description: Verify that a user can report a received message with a selected reason and receives confirmation
preconditions: User has at least one received message in a chat

steps.description: 1. Open the chat containing the received message
steps.expected_result: The chat view displays the received message

steps.description: 2. Select the message options menu
steps.expected_result: The message options are displayed, including 'Melden'

steps.description: 3. Tap 'Melden'
steps.expected_result: The report dialog/screen opens with a list of report reasons

steps.description: 4. Select a valid report reason
steps.expected_result: The selected reason is highlighted/selected

steps.description: 5. Tap 'Senden' or 'Bestätigen'
steps.expected_result: The report is submitted

test_cases.expected_result: The report is successfully saved and a confirmation message is shown to the user

test_cases.title: Report contact successfully with valid reason
test_cases.description: Verify that a user can report a contact with a selected reason and receives confirmation
preconditions: User has at least one contact or chat partner

steps.description: 1. Open the contact/profile view from a chat
steps.expected_result: The contact/profile view is displayed

steps.description: 2. Tap the options menu and select 'Melden'
steps.expected_result: The report dialog/screen opens with a list of report reasons

steps.description: 3. Select a valid report reason
steps.expected_result: The selected reason is highlighted/selected

steps.description: 4. Tap 'Senden' or 'Bestätigen'
steps.expected_result: The report is submitted

test_cases.expected_result: The report is successfully saved and a confirmation message is shown to the user

test_cases.title: Prevent report submission without selecting a reason
test_cases.description: Verify that the report cannot be sent without selecting a reason
preconditions: User is viewing a received message or contact

steps.description: 1. Open the report dialog by selecting 'Melden'
steps.expected_result: The report dialog/screen opens with a list of report reasons

steps.description: 2. Do not select any reason
steps.expected_result: No reason is selected

steps.description: 3. Tap 'Senden' or 'Bestätigen'
steps.expected_result: Submission is blocked and an error/prompt is displayed

test_cases.expected_result: The report is not sent and the user is prompted to select a reason

test_cases.title: Handle network interruption during report submission
test_cases.description: Verify that the user receives an error when reporting without network connection
preconditions: User is viewing a received message or contact

steps.description: 1. Open the report dialog by selecting 'Melden'
steps.expected_result: The report dialog/screen opens with a list of report reasons

steps.description: 2. Select a valid report reason
steps.expected_result: The selected reason is highlighted/selected

steps.description: 3. Tap 'Senden' or 'Bestätigen'
steps.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating network failure

test_cases.expected_result: The report is not saved and the user is informed of the failure

test_cases.title: Boundary test: single available report reason
test_cases.description: Verify that reporting works when only one reason is available
preconditions: Only one report reason is configured in the system
User is viewing a received message

steps.description: 1. Open the report dialog by selecting 'Melden'
steps.expected_result: The report dialog opens and displays a single reason

steps.description: 2. Select the only available reason
steps.expected_result: The reason is selected

steps.description: 3. Tap 'Senden' or 'Bestätigen'
steps.expected_result: The report is submitted

test_cases.expected_result: The report is successfully saved and a confirmation message is shown

test_cases.title: Cancel report flow without submission
test_cases.description: Verify that closing the report dialog does not submit a report
preconditions: User is viewing a received message or contact

steps.description: 1. Open the report dialog by selecting 'Melden'
steps.expected_result: The report dialog/screen opens

steps.description: 2. Select a valid report reason
steps.expected_result: The selected reason is highlighted/selected

steps.description: 3. Tap 'Abbrechen' or close the dialog
steps.expected_result: The dialog closes

test_cases.expected_result: No report is submitted and no confirmation is shown

test_cases.title: Verify confirmation message content and visibility
test_cases.description: Validate the confirmation message is displayed after successful report submission
preconditions: User is viewing a received message

steps.description: 1. Open the report dialog by selecting 'Melden'
steps.expected_result: The report dialog/screen opens with report reasons

steps.description: 2. Select a valid report reason
steps.expected_result: The selected reason is highlighted/selected

steps.description: 3. Tap 'Senden' or 'Bestätigen'
steps.expected_result: The report is submitted

steps.description: 4. Observe the confirmation message
steps.expected_result: A confirmation message is visible and readable

test_cases.expected_result: A confirmation message appears indicating the report was saved successfully

test_cases.title: Multiple report attempts for the same message
test_cases.description: Verify system behavior when the same message is reported multiple times
preconditions: User is viewing a received message

steps.description: 1. Report the message with a valid reason and submit
steps.expected_result: The report is saved and a confirmation is shown

steps.description: 2. Attempt to report the same message again
steps.expected_result: The report dialog opens

steps.description: 3. Select a reason and submit
steps.expected_result: The system processes the request according to business rules (e.g., allows or prevents duplicates)

test_cases.expected_result: System handles duplicate report attempts predictably and informs the user if necessary

test_cases.title: Report reason selection UI state reset
test_cases.description: Verify the report reason selection is cleared when reopening the report dialog
preconditions: User is viewing a received message

steps.description: 1. Open the report dialog and select a reason
steps.expected_result: A reason is selected

steps.description: 2. Close the report dialog without submitting
steps.expected_result: The dialog closes

steps.description: 3. Reopen the report dialog
steps.expected_result: No reason is preselected

test_cases.expected_result: The report dialog opens with no preselected reason

test_cases.title: Activate PIN security with valid PIN
test_cases.description: Verify that a user can enable PIN security with a valid PIN and it becomes active.

steps.description: 1. Select the option to enable PIN security.
steps.expected_result: PIN input fields are displayed.

steps.description: 2. Enter a valid PIN that meets format and length rules.
steps.expected_result: PIN input is accepted without validation errors.

steps.description: 3. Confirm the same PIN and submit.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation is accepted and activation completes.

test_cases.expected_result: PIN security is enabled and marked as active in settings.

test_cases.title: PIN prompt appears for sensitive action when PIN security is active
test_cases.description: Verify that sensitive actions require PIN entry after activation.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to a sensitive action (e.g., change email/password).
steps.expected_result: PIN prompt is displayed before proceeding.

steps.description: 2. Enter the correct PIN and submit.
steps.expected_result: Action proceeds successfully.

test_cases.expected_result: Sensitive action requires and validates PIN when PIN security is active.

test_cases.title: Activation fails with invalid PIN format (non-numeric)
test_cases.description: Verify validation for PIN format rules when non-numeric input is used.

steps.description: 1. Select the option to enable PIN security.
steps.expected_result: PIN input fields are displayed.

steps.description: 2. Enter a PIN containing letters or special characters.
steps.expected_result: Inline validation message indicates invalid PIN format.

steps.description: 3. Attempt to confirm and submit.
steps.expected_result: Activation is prevented.

test_cases.expected_result: A clear error message is shown and PIN security remains disabled.

test_cases.title: Activation fails with invalid PIN length (too short)
test_cases.description: Verify validation for minimum PIN length boundary.

steps.description: 1. Select the option to enable PIN security.
steps.expected_result: PIN input fields are displayed.

steps.description: 2. Enter a PIN shorter than the minimum required length.
steps.expected_result: Validation message indicates PIN length is too short.

steps.description: 3. Attempt to confirm and submit.
steps.expected_result: Activation is prevented.

test_cases.expected_result: A clear error message is shown and PIN security remains disabled.

test_cases.title: Activation fails with invalid PIN length (too long)
test_cases.description: Verify validation for maximum PIN length boundary.

steps.description: 1. Select the option to enable PIN security.
steps.expected_result: PIN input fields are displayed.

steps.description: 2. Enter a PIN longer than the maximum allowed length.
steps.expected_result: Validation message indicates PIN length is too long.

steps.description: 3. Attempt to confirm and submit.
steps.expected_result: Activation is prevented.

test_cases.expected_result: A clear error message is shown and PIN security remains disabled.

test_cases.title: Activation fails when PIN and confirmation do not match
test_cases.description: Verify that mismatched PIN confirmation is rejected.

steps.description: 1. Select the option to enable PIN security.
steps.expected_result: PIN input fields are displayed.

steps.description: 2. Enter a valid PIN.
steps.expected_result: PIN input is accepted.

steps.description: 3. Enter a different PIN in the confirmation field and submit.
steps.expected_result: Validation message indicates PINs do not match.

test_cases.expected_result: A clear error message is shown and PIN security remains disabled.

test_cases.title: Temporary block after multiple incorrect PIN attempts
test_cases.description: Verify that repeated incorrect PIN attempts trigger a temporary block and security message.

steps.description: 1. Initiate a sensitive action to trigger PIN prompt.
steps.expected_result: PIN prompt is displayed.

steps.description: 2. Enter an incorrect PIN repeatedly until the configured attempt limit is reached.
steps.expected_result: Each incorrect attempt is rejected with an error message.

steps.description: 3. Attempt the sensitive action again after the limit is reached.
steps.expected_result: Access is temporarily blocked and a security message is displayed.

test_cases.expected_result: Sensitive action is blocked temporarily and a security warning is shown after multiple failed attempts.

test_cases.title: Unblock behavior after temporary lockout period
test_cases.description: Verify that access is restored after the lockout period expires.
preconditions: User is currently in a temporary lockout state

steps.description: 1. Wait until the lockout period has elapsed.
steps.expected_result: Lockout period expires.

steps.description: 2. Initiate the same sensitive action to trigger PIN prompt.
steps.expected_result: PIN prompt is displayed.

steps.description: 3. Enter the correct PIN.
steps.expected_result: Sensitive action proceeds successfully.

test_cases.expected_result: User can access sensitive actions after the lockout period by entering the correct PIN.

test_cases.title: PIN security remains disabled after invalid activation attempt
test_cases.description: Verify that invalid activation attempts do not enable PIN security.

steps.description: 1. Attempt to enable PIN security with an invalid PIN.
steps.expected_result: Validation error is displayed.

steps.description: 2. Refresh the security settings page.
steps.expected_result: Settings page reloads.

test_cases.expected_result: PIN security remains disabled in the settings.

test_cases.title: PIN prompt not shown when PIN security is disabled
test_cases.description: Verify that sensitive actions do not require PIN when PIN security is not active.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to a sensitive action (e.g., change email/password).
steps.expected_result: Action is accessible without a PIN prompt.

steps.description: 2. Complete the sensitive action.
steps.expected_result: Action completes successfully.

test_cases.expected_result: No PIN prompt is shown when PIN security is disabled.

test_cases.title: TC01 - Spam erkannt durch bekanntes Muster
test_cases.description: Verifiziert, dass Nachrichten mit bekannten Spam-Mustern automatisch als Spam markiert und gefiltert werden.
preconditions: Bekannte Spam-Muster sind im System hinterlegt

steps.description: 1. Sende eine eingehende Nachricht mit einem bekannten Spam-Muster (z. B. 'Win money now!')
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird vom System zur Analyse angenommen

steps.description: 2. Warte auf die Verarbeitung der Nachricht
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird als Spam markiert und nicht zugestellt

test_cases.expected_result: Die Nachricht ist als Spam gekennzeichnet und gefiltert.

test_cases.title: TC02 - Spam erkannt durch Schwellenwertüberschreitung
test_cases.description: Verifiziert, dass Nachrichten, die definierte Schwellenwerte (z. B. Anzahl Links) überschreiten, als Spam markiert werden.
preconditions: Schwellenwert z. B. max. 3 Links pro Nachricht ist konfiguriert

steps.description: 1. Sende eine ausgehende Nachricht mit 4 Links
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird vom System zur Analyse angenommen

steps.description: 2. Warte auf die Verarbeitung
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird als Spam markiert und gefiltert

test_cases.expected_result: Die Nachricht wird als Spam markiert und nicht weitergeleitet.

test_cases.title: TC03 - Legitimer Inhalt mit partieller Ähnlichkeit
test_cases.description: Stellt sicher, dass legitime Nachrichten, die nur teilweise Spam-Mustern ähneln, nicht blockiert werden.

steps.description: 1. Sende eine legitime Nachricht mit Satz 'Buy now' im Kontext eines normalen Supports (z. B. Produktkauf-Anfrage)
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird vom System zur Analyse angenommen

steps.description: 2. Warte auf die Verarbeitung
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird nicht als Spam markiert

test_cases.expected_result: Die Nachricht wird als nicht-spam weitergeleitet.

test_cases.title: TC04 - Schwellenwert-Grenzfall exakt erreicht
test_cases.description: Prüft das Grenzverhalten, wenn die Nachricht den Schwellenwert genau erreicht.
preconditions: Schwellenwert z. B. max. 3 Links pro Nachricht ist konfiguriert

steps.description: 1. Sende eine Nachricht mit genau 3 Links
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird vom System zur Analyse angenommen

steps.description: 2. Warte auf die Verarbeitung
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird nicht als Spam markiert

test_cases.expected_result: Die Nachricht wird zugestellt und nicht gefiltert.

test_cases.title: TC05 - Spam-Erkennung nicht verfügbar
test_cases.description: Verifiziert, dass bei Ausfall der Spam-Erkennung die Nachricht zugestellt und der Ausfall protokolliert wird.

steps.description: 1. Simuliere den Ausfall des Spam-Erkennungsdienstes
steps.expected_result: System erkennt den Ausfallzustand

steps.description: 2. Sende eine eingehende Nachricht
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird zugestellt

steps.description: 3. Prüfe die Monitoring-Logs
steps.expected_result: Der Ausfall ist protokolliert

test_cases.expected_result: Nachricht wird zugestellt und der Ausfall wird im Monitoring erfasst.

test_cases.title: TC06 - Ausgehende Nachricht mit Spam-Muster
test_cases.description: Stellt sicher, dass auch ausgehende Nachrichten mit Spam-Mustern gefiltert werden.
preconditions: Bekannte Spam-Muster sind im System hinterlegt

steps.description: 1. Sende eine ausgehende Nachricht mit bekanntem Spam-Muster
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird vom System zur Analyse angenommen

steps.description: 2. Warte auf die Verarbeitung
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird als Spam markiert

test_cases.expected_result: Die ausgehende Nachricht wird als Spam markiert und nicht versendet.

steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird nicht als Spam markiert

test_cases.title: TC08 - Nachrichtenverarbeitung mit hohem Volumen

steps.expected_result: Spam wird korrekt gefiltert, legitime Nachrichten werden weitergeleitet; Verarbeitungszeit innerhalb definierter Limits

test_cases.title: Outgoing call: IP addresses are not displayed or transmitted to client UI
test_cases.description: Verify that when a user initiates a call, neither party’s IP address is shown in the client UI or transmitted via visible client data.
preconditions: User A and User B have valid accounts
Both users are logged in on supported clients

steps.description: 1. User A initiates a call to User B through the platform.
steps.expected_result: Call signaling is initiated and User B receives an incoming call notification.

steps.description: 2. User B accepts the call.
steps.expected_result: Call connects successfully between User A and User B.

steps.description: 3. User A and User B check the in-call UI for any IP address information.
steps.expected_result: No IP addresses are displayed in the client UI for either user.

steps.description: 4. Inspect client-visible connection details (e.g., call stats screen if available).
steps.expected_result: No raw IP addresses are shown; only masked/obfuscated or non-IP identifiers appear.

test_cases.expected_result: IP addresses are not visible in client UI or client-visible connection details for an outgoing call.

test_cases.title: Incoming call: Caller IP address is hidden from recipient
test_cases.description: Verify that when a user receives an incoming call, the caller’s IP is not visible to the recipient.
preconditions: User A and User B have valid accounts
Both users are logged in on supported clients

steps.description: 1. User A initiates a call to User B.
steps.expected_result: User B receives an incoming call notification.

steps.description: 2. User B accepts the call.
steps.expected_result: Call connects successfully.

steps.description: 3. User B checks any call info panels or diagnostics available in the client.
steps.expected_result: No caller IP address is visible.

test_cases.expected_result: Caller IP address is not visible to the recipient during an incoming call.

test_cases.title: Client logs: No clear-text IP addresses during active session
test_cases.description: Ensure client logs do not contain clear-text IP addresses while a call session is active.
preconditions: User A and User B have valid accounts
Debug logging is enabled for the client

steps.description: 1. User A initiates a call to User B and the call connects.
steps.expected_result: Call is active.

steps.description: 2. Collect client logs from User A and User B during the active call.
steps.expected_result: Logs are successfully captured.

steps.description: 3. Search logs for IP address patterns (IPv4 and IPv6).
steps.expected_result: No clear-text IP addresses are present in the logs.

test_cases.expected_result: Client logs contain no clear-text IP addresses during an active call session.

test_cases.title: Negative: Attempt to extract IP via client network tools is blocked or masked
test_cases.description: Verify that built-in client network tools or diagnostics do not expose IP addresses.
preconditions: User A and User B are logged in

steps.description: 1. Start a call between User A and User B.
steps.expected_result: Call is connected.

steps.description: 2. Open the client’s network/diagnostic view during the call.
steps.expected_result: Network/diagnostic view opens.

steps.description: 3. Review any connection details presented.
steps.expected_result: No raw IP addresses are displayed; any identifiers are masked or abstracted.

test_cases.expected_result: Client network/diagnostic tools do not expose raw IP addresses.

test_cases.title: Boundary: Call reconnect after network drop does not reveal IP addresses
test_cases.description: Ensure IP masking persists during reconnection scenarios.
preconditions: User A and User B are logged in

steps.description: 1. Establish a call between User A and User B.
steps.expected_result: Call is connected.

steps.description: 2. Simulate a brief network drop for User A and allow automatic reconnection.
steps.expected_result: Call reconnects successfully.

steps.description: 3. Check UI and diagnostics after reconnection.
steps.expected_result: No IP addresses are shown or logged in clear text.

test_cases.expected_result: IP masking remains intact after a reconnection event.

test_cases.title: Negative: Attempt to view IP in exported call report is blocked
test_cases.description: Verify that any client-exported call reports do not contain clear-text IP addresses.
preconditions: User A and User B are logged in

steps.description: 1. Place a call between User A and User B and end the call.
steps.expected_result: Call ends successfully.

steps.description: 2. Export the call report/log from the client.
steps.expected_result: Report is generated and downloaded.

steps.description: 3. Inspect the report for IP address patterns.
steps.expected_result: No clear-text IP addresses are present.

test_cases.expected_result: Exported call reports do not include clear-text IP addresses.

test_cases.title: Boundary: IPv6 addresses are also masked in logs and UI
test_cases.description: Ensure IPv6 addresses are not exposed in any client-visible surface.
preconditions: User A and User B are logged in
At least one client uses an IPv6-enabled network

steps.description: 1. Establish a call between User A and User B using an IPv6-enabled network.
steps.expected_result: Call connects successfully.

steps.description: 2. Review client UI and diagnostics for any address information.
steps.expected_result: No IPv6 addresses are displayed.

steps.description: 3. Capture client logs during the call and search for IPv6 patterns.
steps.expected_result: No IPv6 addresses are present in clear text.

test_cases.expected_result: IPv6 addresses are not exposed in client UI or logs.

test_cases.title: Negative: Local network tools cannot see peer IP via client
test_cases.description: Validate that the client does not leak peer IP through any in-app network capture or debug views.
preconditions: User A and User B are logged in
Client has a debug mode accessible to QA

steps.description: 1. Enable client debug mode on User A’s client.
steps.expected_result: Debug mode is enabled.

steps.description: 2. Start a call to User B and connect.
steps.expected_result: Call is active.

steps.description: 3. Open debug panels or in-app network capture features.
steps.expected_result: Debug information is displayed without raw IP addresses.

test_cases.expected_result: Debug mode does not expose peer IP addresses.

test_cases.title: Receive push notification within SLA when enabled
test_cases.description: Verify push notification delivery within defined SLA when user has enabled notifications and device is online.
preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Push notifications are enabled in app settings
Defined SLA time is known and measurable

steps.description: 1. Trigger a notification event from the system for the logged-in user
steps.expected_result: Notification request is accepted by the system and sent to push service

steps.description: 2. Measure the time from send event to notification receipt on the device
steps.expected_result: Notification arrives on the device within the defined SLA time

test_cases.expected_result: User receives the push notification within SLA when enabled and online.

test_cases.title: No push notification when user disabled notifications
test_cases.description: Verify that no push notification is displayed when user has disabled notifications.
preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Push notifications are disabled in app settings

steps.description: 1. Trigger a notification event from the system for the logged-in user
steps.expected_result: Notification request is processed by the system

steps.description: 2. Observe the device notification tray within the SLA time window
steps.expected_result: No push notification is displayed on the device

test_cases.expected_result: No push notification is shown when user has disabled notifications.

test_cases.title: Queue and deliver notification after push service recovery
test_cases.description: Verify that notifications are queued during push service outage and delivered after recovery.
preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Push notifications are enabled in app settings

steps.description: 1. Trigger a notification event while push service is unreachable
steps.expected_result: System queues the notification for later delivery

steps.description: 2. Restore push service availability
steps.expected_result: System detects service recovery

steps.description: 3. Wait for re-delivery process to run
steps.expected_result: Queued notification is delivered to the device

test_cases.expected_result: Notification is stored during outage and delivered after service recovery.

test_cases.title: Multiple queued notifications delivered in order after recovery
test_cases.description: Verify order and completeness of queued notifications after push service outage.
preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Push notifications are enabled in app settings

steps.description: 1. Trigger three notification events sequentially while service is down
steps.expected_result: All three notifications are queued in the system

steps.description: 2. Restore push service availability
steps.expected_result: System initiates re-delivery of queued notifications

steps.description: 3. Observe notifications received on the device
steps.expected_result: All three notifications are received in the same order they were queued

test_cases.expected_result: Queued notifications are delivered completely and in order after recovery.

test_cases.title: Boundary: SLA delivery time at upper limit
test_cases.description: Verify that delivery at the exact SLA boundary is considered successful.
preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Push notifications are enabled in app settings
Defined SLA time is known and measurable

steps.description: 1. Trigger a notification event and measure delivery time precisely
steps.expected_result: Notification is delivered to device

steps.description: 2. Verify the measured time equals the SLA upper limit
steps.expected_result: Delivery time is less than or equal to the SLA upper limit

test_cases.expected_result: Notification delivered at SLA boundary is accepted as successful.

test_cases.title: Negative: Device offline during send should not count as SLA delivery
test_cases.description: Verify behavior when device has no internet connection at send time.
preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Push notifications are enabled in app settings

steps.description: 1. Trigger a notification event from the system
steps.expected_result: Notification is sent to push service

steps.description: 2. Observe device notification tray within SLA time window
steps.expected_result: No notification is received while device is offline

steps.description: 3. Restore device internet connection
steps.expected_result: Notification is delivered after reconnection according to push service behavior

test_cases.expected_result: No notification is received while offline; delivery occurs after reconnection.

test_cases.title: Toggle notifications off then on and verify delivery
test_cases.description: Verify that enabling notifications after being disabled allows delivery.
preconditions: User is registered and logged in

steps.description: 1. Disable push notifications in app settings
steps.expected_result: Push notifications are disabled

steps.description: 2. Trigger a notification event
steps.expected_result: No notification is displayed

steps.description: 3. Enable push notifications in app settings
steps.expected_result: Push notifications are enabled

steps.description: 4. Trigger another notification event
steps.expected_result: Notification is received within SLA

test_cases.expected_result: Notifications are blocked when disabled and delivered after re-enabling.

test_cases.title: No duplicate delivery after recovery
test_cases.description: Verify that a queued notification is delivered only once after push service recovery.
preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Push notifications are enabled in app settings

steps.description: 1. Trigger a notification event while push service is down
steps.expected_result: Notification is queued

steps.description: 2. Restore push service availability
steps.expected_result: System delivers queued notification

steps.description: 3. Monitor device for duplicates over a reasonable time window
steps.expected_result: Notification is received exactly once

test_cases.expected_result: Queued notification is delivered once without duplication.

test_cases.title: High volume notification send within SLA
test_cases.description: Verify SLA compliance under burst load for a single user.
preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Push notifications are enabled in app settings

steps.description: 1. Trigger a burst of 20 notification events within 1 minute
steps.expected_result: All notifications are accepted by the system

steps.description: 2. Measure delivery times for each notification
steps.expected_result: All notifications are delivered within SLA

test_cases.expected_result: System meets SLA for high-volume sends to a single user.

test_cases.title: Fehlermeldung und erneute Ladeoption bei Systemfehler

test_cases.title: Send quick reply from notification successfully
test_cases.description: Verify that a user can send a reply directly from a notification and the recipient receives it.
preconditions: User B is logged in on another device
User A has received a new message from User B
Notification for the new message is displayed

steps.description: 1. Tap on the notification action 'Antworten'.
steps.expected_result: Quick reply input field is displayed.

steps.description: 2. Enter a valid text message and tap 'Send'.
steps.expected_result: The notification indicates the message is sending or sent.

steps.description: 3. Check User B's device for the new message.
steps.expected_result: User B receives the reply message in the chat.

test_cases.expected_result: Reply is sent from notification and reliably delivered to the recipient.

test_cases.title: Quick reply while device is offline queues message
test_cases.description: Verify that replying while offline shows an offline warning and queues the message to send once online.
preconditions: User A has received a new message and notification is displayed

steps.description: 1. Tap on the notification action 'Antworten'.
steps.expected_result: Quick reply input field is displayed.

steps.description: 2. Enter a reply and tap 'Send'.
steps.expected_result: System shows a warning about missing connection and indicates the message is pending.

steps.description: 3. Restore network connectivity.
steps.expected_result: System automatically sends the pending reply.

steps.description: 4. Check recipient device.
steps.expected_result: Recipient receives the reply after connectivity is restored.

test_cases.expected_result: User is notified of offline status and the reply is sent once the network is restored.

test_cases.title: Prevent quick reply when chat was deleted
test_cases.description: Verify that a reply cannot be sent from a stale notification if the chat has been deleted.
preconditions: User A has a notification for a message in a chat
The corresponding chat was deleted by User A or no longer exists

steps.description: 1. Tap on the notification action 'Antworten'.
steps.expected_result: Quick reply input field is displayed or the system attempts to send.

steps.description: 2. Enter a reply and tap 'Send'.
steps.expected_result: System blocks sending and displays a message that the chat is not available.

test_cases.expected_result: Reply is not sent and user is informed that the chat is unavailable.

test_cases.title: Quick reply with empty message is not sent
test_cases.description: Validate that empty quick replies are blocked.
preconditions: A new message notification is displayed

steps.description: 1. Tap on 'Antworten' from the notification.
steps.expected_result: Quick reply input field is displayed.

steps.description: 2. Leave the message empty and tap 'Send'.
steps.expected_result: System prevents sending and shows validation feedback.

test_cases.expected_result: Empty messages are not sent and the user is informed.

test_cases.title: Quick reply with maximum allowed length
test_cases.description: Verify that a message at the maximum allowed length can be sent successfully.
preconditions: A new message notification is displayed

steps.description: 1. Tap on 'Antworten' from the notification.
steps.expected_result: Quick reply input field is displayed.

steps.description: 2. Enter a message with the maximum allowed length and tap 'Send'.
steps.expected_result: Message is accepted and sending is initiated.

steps.description: 3. Verify on recipient device.
steps.expected_result: Recipient receives the full message without truncation.

test_cases.expected_result: Maximum-length message is sent and received successfully.

test_cases.title: Quick reply exceeding maximum length is blocked
test_cases.description: Validate that messages exceeding the maximum allowed length cannot be sent.
preconditions: A new message notification is displayed

steps.description: 1. Tap on 'Antworten' from the notification.
steps.expected_result: Quick reply input field is displayed.

steps.description: 2. Enter a message exceeding the maximum length and tap 'Send'.
steps.expected_result: System blocks sending and displays a length validation message.

test_cases.expected_result: Overlength messages are not sent and a validation message is shown.

test_cases.title: Quick reply when notification is dismissed
test_cases.description: Ensure that replying is not possible if the notification is dismissed before interaction.
preconditions: A new message notification is displayed

steps.description: 1. Dismiss the notification without opening the app.
steps.expected_result: Notification is removed from the notification tray.

steps.description: 2. Attempt to respond from the dismissed notification (e.g., via notification history if supported).
steps.expected_result: Quick reply action is not available or cannot be initiated.

test_cases.expected_result: User cannot send a reply from a dismissed notification.

test_cases.title: Reliable delivery confirmation after quick reply
test_cases.description: Verify that the sender sees a sent status and the recipient receives the reply reliably.
preconditions: A new message notification is displayed for User A

steps.description: 1. Send a reply from the notification.
steps.expected_result: System displays sending/sent indicator.

steps.description: 2. Open the app and go to the chat.
steps.expected_result: The reply appears in the chat with a sent status.

steps.description: 3. Verify User B's chat view.
steps.expected_result: User B sees the reply message.

test_cases.expected_result: Reply shows correct status for sender and is received by the recipient.

test_cases.title: Receive real-time reaction notification for own message
test_cases.description: Verify that a user receives a real-time notification with sender, message preview, and reaction when another user reacts to their message

test_cases.title: Unbekannte Nachricht wird in separaten Bereich einsortiert
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass Nachrichten von unbekannten, nicht verifizierten Absendern nicht im regulären Posteingang erscheinen.

steps.description: 1. Sende eine Nachricht von einem unbekannten, nicht verifizierten Absender an den User.
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird vom System empfangen.

steps.description: 2. Öffne den regulären Posteingang.
steps.expected_result: Die neue Nachricht ist im regulären Posteingang nicht sichtbar.

steps.description: 3. Öffne den Bereich für unbekannte Absender.
steps.expected_result: Die neue Nachricht ist im Bereich für unbekannte Absender sichtbar.

test_cases.expected_result: Die unbekannte Nachricht ist ausschließlich im separaten Bereich für unbekannte Absender sichtbar.

test_cases.title: Bekannt markieren verschiebt zukünftige Nachrichten in Posteingang
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass das Bestätigen eines Absenders als bekannt dessen zukünftige Nachrichten in den regulären Posteingang liefert.
preconditions: Mindestens eine Nachricht eines unbekannten Absenders ist im Bereich für unbekannte Absender

steps.description: 1. Öffne den Bereich für unbekannte Absender.
steps.expected_result: Liste unbekannter Absender wird angezeigt.

steps.description: 2. Wähle einen Absender aus und bestätige ihn als bekannt.
steps.expected_result: Absender wird als bekannt markiert.

steps.description: 3. Sende eine neue Nachricht von diesem Absender an den User.
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird vom System empfangen.

steps.description: 4. Öffne den regulären Posteingang.
steps.expected_result: Neue Nachricht erscheint im regulären Posteingang.

test_cases.expected_result: Zukünftige Nachrichten des bestätigten Absenders erscheinen im regulären Posteingang.

test_cases.title: Sicherheitswarnung bei unsicheren Links oder Anhängen
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass bei potenziell unsicheren Links/Anhängen eine Warnung angezeigt wird und explizite Bestätigung erforderlich ist.

steps.description: 1. Sende eine Nachricht mit potenziell unsicherem Link oder Anhang von einem unbekannten Absender.
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird vom System empfangen.

steps.description: 2. Öffne den Bereich für unbekannte Absender und die Nachricht.
steps.expected_result: Sicherheitswarnung wird angezeigt.

steps.description: 3. Versuche den Link/Anhang zu öffnen.
steps.expected_result: Das System fordert eine explizite Bestätigung vor dem Öffnen.

test_cases.expected_result: Unsicherer Inhalt ist nur nach expliziter Bestätigung zugänglich.

test_cases.title: Keine Warnung bei unbekannter Nachricht ohne unsicheren Inhalt
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass keine Sicherheitswarnung angezeigt wird, wenn keine unsicheren Inhalte vorhanden sind.

steps.description: 1. Sende eine Nachricht ohne Links oder Anhänge von einem unbekannten Absender.
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird vom System empfangen.

steps.description: 2. Öffne den Bereich für unbekannte Absender und die Nachricht.
steps.expected_result: Keine Sicherheitswarnung wird angezeigt.

test_cases.expected_result: Nachricht wird ohne Sicherheitswarnung angezeigt.

test_cases.title: Bekannter Absender erscheint im regulären Posteingang
test_cases.description: Negativtest: Nachricht von bekanntem Absender darf nicht in den Bereich für unbekannte Absender einsortiert werden.
preconditions: Absender ist in Kontakten oder verifiziert

steps.description: 1. Sende eine Nachricht von einem bekannten/verifizierten Absender.
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird vom System empfangen.

steps.description: 2. Öffne den regulären Posteingang.
steps.expected_result: Nachricht ist im regulären Posteingang sichtbar.

steps.description: 3. Öffne den Bereich für unbekannte Absender.
steps.expected_result: Nachricht ist dort nicht vorhanden.

test_cases.expected_result: Bekannte Absender erscheinen nur im regulären Posteingang.

test_cases.title: Grenzfall: Absender kurz vor Verifizierung
test_cases.description: Prüft den Grenzfall, wenn ein Absender noch nicht verifiziert ist, aber in Kürze verifiziert wird.
preconditions: Absender ist nicht verifiziert und nicht in Kontakten

steps.description: 1. Sende eine Nachricht von dem noch nicht verifizierten Absender.
steps.expected_result: Nachricht wird im Bereich für unbekannte Absender angezeigt.

steps.description: 2. Verifiziere den Absender im System.
steps.expected_result: Absenderstatus wird auf verifiziert gesetzt.

steps.description: 3. Sende eine weitere Nachricht von diesem Absender.
steps.expected_result: Neue Nachricht erscheint im regulären Posteingang.

test_cases.expected_result: Nach Verifizierung werden neue Nachrichten im regulären Posteingang angezeigt.

test_cases.title: Explizite Bestätigung erforderlich und ablehnbar
test_cases.description: Negativtest: Öffnen eines unsicheren Inhalts darf ohne Bestätigung nicht möglich sein.
preconditions: Unbekannte Nachricht mit unsicherem Link/Anhang vorhanden

steps.description: 1. Öffne die Nachricht mit unsicherem Link/Anhang.
steps.expected_result: Sicherheitswarnung wird angezeigt.

steps.description: 2. Wähle die Option zum Abbrechen der Bestätigung.
steps.expected_result: Inhalt wird nicht geöffnet.

test_cases.expected_result: Unsicherer Inhalt bleibt gesperrt, wenn keine Bestätigung erfolgt.

test_cases.title: Verwaltung unbekannter Absender: Mehrere Absender in Liste
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass mehrere unbekannte Absender korrekt gelistet und selektierbar sind.
preconditions: Mindestens zwei unbekannte Absender haben Nachrichten gesendet

steps.description: 1. Öffne den Bereich für unbekannte Absender.
steps.expected_result: Mehrere unbekannte Absender werden in der Liste angezeigt.

steps.description: 2. Wähle den zweiten Absender aus.
steps.expected_result: Nachrichten des ausgewählten Absenders werden angezeigt.

test_cases.expected_result: Alle unbekannten Absender sind korrekt gelistet und auswählbar.

test_cases.title: Volltextsuche liefert passende Nachrichten

steps.description: 2. Gib einen Suchbegriff ein, der in mehreren Nachrichten vorkommt.
steps.expected_result: Suchbegriff erscheint im Suchfeld.

steps.description: 3. Starte die Suche (z. B. Enter oder Suchbutton).
steps.expected_result: Die Suche wird gestartet.

test_cases.expected_result: Passende Nachrichten werden in kurzer Zeit angezeigt.

test_cases.title: Keine Treffer bei nicht vorhandenem Begriff
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass bei einem seltenen oder nicht vorkommenden Begriff eine leere Ergebnisliste mit Hinweis angezeigt wird.

steps.expected_result: Suchfeld ist sichtbar.

steps.expected_result: Suchbegriff erscheint im Suchfeld.

steps.description: 3. Starte die Suche.
steps.expected_result: Die Suche wird ausgeführt.

test_cases.expected_result: Eine leere Ergebnisliste wird angezeigt und ein Hinweis informiert über keine Treffer.

test_cases.title: Fehlermeldung bei nicht verfügbarer Suchfunktion
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass bei temporär nicht verfügbarer Suchfunktion eine verständliche Fehlermeldung erscheint und die Eingabe erhalten bleibt.
preconditions: Suchfunktion ist vorübergehend nicht verfügbar (z. B. simuliert durch Service-Ausfall)

steps.description: 1. Öffne den Nachrichtenbereich mit Suchfeld.
steps.expected_result: Suchfeld ist sichtbar.

steps.description: 2. Gib einen gültigen Suchbegriff ein.
steps.expected_result: Suchbegriff erscheint im Suchfeld.

steps.description: 3. Starte die Suche.
steps.expected_result: Die Suche wird angestoßen.

test_cases.expected_result: Eine verständliche Fehlermeldung wird angezeigt und der Suchbegriff bleibt im Suchfeld erhalten.

test_cases.title: Suche mit sehr kurzem Suchbegriff (Boundary)
test_cases.description: Prüft das Verhalten bei einem minimalen Suchbegriff (z. B. 1 Zeichen).

steps.description: 1. Öffne den Nachrichtenbereich mit Suchfeld.
steps.expected_result: Suchfeld ist sichtbar.

steps.description: 2. Gib einen Suchbegriff mit 1 Zeichen ein.
steps.expected_result: Ein Zeichen erscheint im Suchfeld.

steps.description: 3. Starte die Suche.
steps.expected_result: Die Suche wird ausgeführt.

test_cases.expected_result: Die Ergebnisse werden entsprechend dem Systemverhalten angezeigt (Treffer oder leere Liste), ohne Fehler.

test_cases.title: Suche mit sehr langem Suchbegriff (Boundary)
test_cases.description: Prüft das Verhalten bei einem sehr langen Suchbegriff (z. B. 256+ Zeichen).

steps.description: 1. Öffne den Nachrichtenbereich mit Suchfeld.
steps.expected_result: Suchfeld ist sichtbar.

steps.description: 2. Gib einen sehr langen Suchbegriff ein.
steps.expected_result: Der Suchbegriff wird akzeptiert oder gemäß UI-Regeln gekürzt, ohne UI-Fehler.

steps.description: 3. Starte die Suche.
steps.expected_result: Die Suche wird ausgeführt.

test_cases.expected_result: Die Suche reagiert stabil und zeigt entweder passende Ergebnisse oder eine leere Liste ohne Fehler.

test_cases.title: Suche mit Sonderzeichen und Umlauten
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass die Volltextsuche mit Sonderzeichen und Umlauten korrekt funktioniert.

steps.description: 1. Öffne den Nachrichtenbereich mit Suchfeld.
steps.expected_result: Suchfeld ist sichtbar.

steps.description: 2. Gib einen Suchbegriff mit Umlauten/Sonderzeichen ein (z. B. "Größe" oder "C#").
steps.expected_result: Suchbegriff erscheint korrekt im Suchfeld.

steps.description: 3. Starte die Suche.
steps.expected_result: Die Suche wird ausgeführt.

test_cases.expected_result: Passende Nachrichten werden angezeigt, sofern vorhanden.

test_cases.title: Leere Sucheingabe (Negative)
test_cases.description: Prüft das Verhalten beim Starten einer Suche ohne Suchbegriff.

steps.description: 1. Öffne den Nachrichtenbereich mit Suchfeld.
steps.expected_result: Suchfeld ist sichtbar und leer.

steps.description: 2. Starte die Suche ohne Eingabe.
steps.expected_result: Die Suche wird nicht ausgeführt oder es erscheint ein Hinweis.

test_cases.expected_result: Es wird ein verständlicher Hinweis angezeigt oder die Suche wird verhindert, ohne Systemfehler.

test_cases.title: Performance der Volltextsuche
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass Suchergebnisse in kurzer Zeit angezeigt werden.
preconditions: Nachrichtenverlauf mit großer Datenmenge vorhanden (z. B. 10.000 Nachrichten)

steps.description: 1. Öffne den Nachrichtenbereich mit Suchfeld.
steps.expected_result: Suchfeld ist sichtbar.

steps.description: 2. Gib einen häufig vorkommenden Suchbegriff ein.
steps.expected_result: Suchbegriff erscheint im Suchfeld.

steps.description: 3. Starte die Suche und stoppe die Zeit bis zur Anzeige der Ergebnisse.
steps.expected_result: Die Zeit bis zur Ergebnisanzeige wird gemessen.

test_cases.expected_result: Suchergebnisse werden innerhalb der akzeptierten Zeit angezeigt (z. B. <= 2 Sekunden).

test_cases.title: Integration: Suche gegen Backend-Suchservice
test_cases.description: Prüft die erfolgreiche Integration zwischen UI und Suchservice.

steps.description: 1. Öffne den Nachrichtenbereich und gib einen Suchbegriff ein.
steps.expected_result: Suchbegriff erscheint im Suchfeld.

steps.description: 2. Starte die Suche.
steps.expected_result: Eine Anfrage wird an den Suchservice gesendet.

steps.description: 3. Prüfe, dass die Antworten des Suchservice angezeigt werden.
steps.expected_result: Die UI zeigt die vom Backend gelieferten Treffer.

test_cases.expected_result: UI und Suchservice arbeiten korrekt zusammen und liefern konsistente Ergebnisse.

test_cases.title: E2E: Vollständiger Suchfluss mit Treffer
test_cases.description: Prüft den End-to-End-Fluss von Login bis Suchergebnisanzeige.

steps.description: 1. Melde dich mit gültigen Zugangsdaten an.

steps.expected_result: Nachrichtenbereich wird angezeigt.

steps.description: 3. Gib einen Suchbegriff ein und starte die Suche.
steps.expected_result: Die Suche wird ausgeführt.

test_cases.expected_result: Passende Nachrichten werden angezeigt und der Nutzer kann die Kommunikation fortsetzen.

test_cases.title: Jump to first message of selected valid date

test_cases.title: Set visibility to 'Nur Kontakte' and verify contacts can see status

preconditions: User A has at least one confirmed contact (User B)

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Datenschutzeinstellungen
steps.expected_result: Datenschutzeinstellungen page is displayed

steps.description: 2. Set Online-Status visibility to 'Nur Kontakte'
steps.expected_result: Option 'Nur Kontakte' is selected

steps.description: 3. Save the settings
steps.expected_result: A success confirmation is displayed and settings are saved

steps.description: 4. As User B, view User A's profile or chat list
steps.expected_result: User A's online status is visible to User B

steps.description: 5. As User C, view User A's profile or chat list
steps.expected_result: User A's online status is not visible to User C

test_cases.expected_result: Online status is visible only to confirmed contacts.

test_cases.title: Set visibility to 'Niemand' and verify no one can see status

preconditions: User A has at least one confirmed contact (User B)

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Datenschutzeinstellungen

steps.expected_result: Option 'Niemand' is selected

steps.expected_result: User A's online status is not visible to User B

steps.description: 5. As User C, view User A's profile or chat list
steps.expected_result: User A's online status is not visible to User C

test_cases.expected_result: Online status is hidden from all users.

test_cases.title: Reject invalid visibility value from client
test_cases.description: Verify that invalid visibility values are rejected and an error message is shown.

steps.description: 1. Open Datenschutzeinstellungen
steps.expected_result: Datenschutzeinstellungen page is displayed

steps.expected_result: Request contains invalid visibility value

steps.description: 3. Attempt to save the settings
steps.expected_result: System rejects the change and shows a clear validation error

test_cases.expected_result: Invalid visibility value is not saved and a user-friendly error is displayed.

test_cases.title: Persisted setting after page refresh
test_cases.description: Verify that the selected visibility setting persists after refresh.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Datenschutzeinstellungen
steps.expected_result: Datenschutzeinstellungen page is displayed

steps.expected_result: A success confirmation is displayed and settings are saved

steps.description: 3. Refresh the page
steps.expected_result: Datenschutzeinstellungen page reloads

steps.description: 4. Verify the selected value
steps.expected_result: Option 'Nur Kontakte' remains selected

test_cases.expected_result: Visibility setting persists after refresh.

test_cases.title: Boundary test: No confirmed contacts with 'Nur Kontakte'

preconditions: User A has zero confirmed contacts
User C exists and is not a confirmed contact of User A

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Datenschutzeinstellungen
steps.expected_result: Datenschutzeinstellungen page is displayed

steps.description: 2. Set Online-Status visibility to 'Nur Kontakte' and save
steps.expected_result: A success confirmation is displayed and settings are saved

steps.description: 3. As User C, view User A's profile or chat list
steps.expected_result: User A's online status is not visible to User C

test_cases.expected_result: Online status is not visible to any user when there are no confirmed contacts.

test_cases.title: Unauthorized access to Datenschutzeinstellungen
test_cases.description: Verify that unauthenticated users cannot change online status visibility.

steps.description: 1. Attempt to open Datenschutzeinstellungen directly via URL
steps.expected_result: User is redirected to login or access is denied

steps.description: 2. Attempt to submit a visibility change via API without authentication
steps.expected_result: Request is rejected with unauthorized error

test_cases.expected_result: Unauthenticated users cannot access or modify visibility settings.

test_cases.title: Integration: Verify visibility change reflected in chat list
test_cases.description: Verify that changes to online status visibility are reflected in other users' chat list UI.
preconditions: User B is a confirmed contact of User A

steps.description: 1. User A sets Online-Status visibility to 'Niemand' and saves
steps.expected_result: A success confirmation is displayed

steps.description: 2. User B opens chat list containing User A
steps.expected_result: User A's online status is not shown in chat list

steps.description: 3. User A sets Online-Status visibility to 'Nur Kontakte' and saves
steps.expected_result: A success confirmation is displayed

steps.description: 4. User B refreshes chat list
steps.expected_result: User A's online status is visible in chat list

test_cases.expected_result: Chat list reflects the updated visibility settings.

test_cases.title: E2E: Toggle settings and validate privacy enforcement
test_cases.description: End-to-end verification that privacy settings affect visibility across the system.
preconditions: User B is a confirmed contact of User A
User C is not a confirmed contact of User A

steps.description: 1. User A sets visibility to 'Nur Kontakte' and saves
steps.expected_result: Settings saved successfully

steps.description: 2. User B views User A
steps.expected_result: Online status is visible

steps.description: 3. User C views User A
steps.expected_result: Online status is not visible

steps.description: 4. User A sets visibility to 'Niemand' and saves
steps.expected_result: Settings saved successfully

steps.description: 5. User B views User A again
steps.expected_result: Online status is not visible

test_cases.expected_result: Privacy settings are enforced consistently across all views.

test_cases.title: Datennutzung anzeigen bei aktiver Erfassung
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass aktuelle und historische Datennutzung pro Zeitraum angezeigt wird, wenn die Erfassung aktiv ist.
preconditions: Es existieren aktuelle und historische Datennutzungsdaten

steps.description: 1. Öffne das Hauptmenü.
steps.expected_result: Hauptmenü wird angezeigt.

steps.description: 2. Wähle die Ansicht „Datennutzung“.
steps.expected_result: Die Ansicht „Datennutzung“ wird geöffnet.

steps.description: 3. Prüfe die Anzeige des aktuellen Datenverbrauchs.
steps.expected_result: Der aktuelle Datenverbrauch wird mit Einheiten (z. B. MB/GB) angezeigt.

steps.description: 4. Prüfe die Anzeige historischer Verbräuche pro Zeitraum.
steps.expected_result: Historische Datenverbrauchswerte werden pro Zeitraum (z. B. Tag/Woche/Monat) angezeigt.

test_cases.expected_result: Die Ansicht zeigt korrekt den aktuellen und historischen Datenverbrauch pro Zeitraum an.

test_cases.title: Datennutzungslimit erreicht – Nutzerbenachrichtigung und Reduktion
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass bei Erreichen/Überschreiten des Limits informiert und Datennutzung reduziert wird.
preconditions: Die Reduktionsoption ist konfiguriert (z. B. reduzierte Bildqualität)

steps.description: 1. Simuliere Datenverbrauch bis exakt zum definierten Limit.
steps.expected_result: Der Datenverbrauch erreicht den Grenzwert.

steps.description: 2. Beobachte die Systemreaktion.
steps.expected_result: Der Nutzer wird über das Erreichen des Limits informiert.

steps.description: 3. Simuliere zusätzlichen Datenverbrauch über das Limit hinaus.
steps.expected_result: Das System reduziert die Datennutzung gemäß gewählter Einstellung.

test_cases.expected_result: Bei Erreichen/Überschreiten des Limits erfolgt eine Benachrichtigung und eine Reduktion der Datennutzung.

test_cases.title: Datennutzungslimit überschritten – Reduktion greift weiterhin
test_cases.description: Negativ-/Grenzfall: Prüft Verhalten bei Überschreiten des Limits.

steps.description: 1. Simuliere Datenverbrauch, der das Limit um 1% überschreitet.
steps.expected_result: Der Datenverbrauch liegt über dem Grenzwert.

steps.description: 2. Öffne die Ansicht „Datennutzung“.
steps.expected_result: Der Nutzer sieht die Überschreitung und eine aktive Reduktionsmaßnahme.

test_cases.expected_result: Das System informiert und hält die Reduktion der Datennutzung aufrecht, wenn das Limit überschritten ist.

test_cases.title: Kein Datenlimit gesetzt – keine Benachrichtigung/Reduktion
test_cases.description: Negativfall: Prüft, dass ohne Limit keine Reduktionslogik greift.

steps.description: 1. Simuliere kontinuierlichen Datenverbrauch.
steps.expected_result: Der Datenverbrauch steigt ohne Limitüberschreitung.

steps.description: 2. Beobachte Benachrichtigungen und Einstellungen.
steps.expected_result: Es erfolgt keine Limit-Benachrichtigung und keine Reduktionsmaßnahme.

test_cases.expected_result: Ohne gesetztes Limit werden keine Limit-bezogenen Aktionen ausgelöst.

test_cases.title: Datennutzungserfassung nicht verfügbar – Fehlermeldung mit Retry
test_cases.description: Prüft, dass bei Nichtverfügbarkeit eine verständliche Fehlermeldung und Retry angezeigt wird.

steps.description: 1. Öffne die Ansicht „Datennutzung“.
steps.expected_result: Eine verständliche Fehlermeldung wird angezeigt.

steps.description: 2. Prüfe die angebotene erneute Versuchsmöglichkeit (Retry).
steps.expected_result: Ein Retry-Button oder Link ist sichtbar.

steps.description: 3. Klicke auf Retry.
steps.expected_result: Das System versucht erneut, die Datennutzung zu laden.

test_cases.expected_result: Bei Nichtverfügbarkeit erscheint eine verständliche Fehlermeldung mit erneuter Versuchsmöglichkeit.

test_cases.title: Historische Datenverbrauchszeiträume korrekt gruppiert
test_cases.description: Prüft die korrekte Gruppierung historischer Daten nach Zeitraum.
preconditions: Historische Daten für mehrere Zeiträume vorhanden

steps.description: 1. Öffne die Ansicht „Datennutzung“.
steps.expected_result: Die Ansicht wird geladen.

steps.description: 2. Wechsle zwischen den Zeitraum-Filtern (z. B. Tag/Woche/Monat).
steps.expected_result: Die angezeigten historischen Werte wechseln entsprechend dem gewählten Zeitraum.

test_cases.expected_result: Historische Daten werden korrekt nach ausgewähltem Zeitraum angezeigt.

test_cases.title: Grenzwert bei exakt 0 und Minimalverbrauch
test_cases.description: Grenzfall: Prüft, dass 0-Verbrauch korrekt dargestellt wird.

steps.description: 1. Öffne die Ansicht „Datennutzung“.
steps.expected_result: Die Ansicht wird geladen.

steps.description: 2. Prüfe die Anzeige des aktuellen Verbrauchs.
steps.expected_result: Der aktuelle Verbrauch wird als 0 mit korrekter Einheit angezeigt.

test_cases.expected_result: Ein Verbrauch von 0 wird korrekt und ohne Fehler dargestellt.

test_cases.title: Performance: Datennutzung Ansicht lädt innerhalb akzeptabler Zeit
test_cases.description: Prüft die Ladezeit der Datennutzungsansicht bei aktiver Erfassung.

steps.description: 1. Öffne die Ansicht „Datennutzung“ und starte die Zeitmessung.
steps.expected_result: Zeitmessung beginnt beim Öffnen.

steps.description: 2. Warte bis alle aktuellen und historischen Daten geladen sind.
steps.expected_result: Alle Daten werden vollständig angezeigt.

steps.description: 3. Stoppe die Zeitmessung.
steps.expected_result: Die Ladezeit liegt innerhalb des definierten Performance-Ziels.

test_cases.expected_result: Die Ansicht „Datennutzung“ lädt performant und erfüllt die Ladezeitvorgaben.
